hooks.command: node -e "const c=process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT||'{}';const t=JSON.parse(c);const cmd=t.command||'';if(/git commit(?!.*--no-verify)/.test(cmd)&&!/npm run lint/.test(cmd)){console.warn('\u26a0 Reminder: Run npm run lint before committing.');}"

node -e "try{const en=require('./locales/en.json');const vi=require('./locales/vi.json');const flat=(o,p='')=>Object.keys(o).flatMap(k=>typeof o[k]==='object'?flat(o[k],p+k+'.'):p+k);const ek=flat(en).sort();const vk=flat(vi).sort();const missing=ek.filter(k=>!vk.includes(k));const extra=vk.filter(k=>!ek.includes(k));if(missing.length)console.warn('\u26a0 vi.json missing keys:',missing);if(extra.length)console.warn('\u26a0 vi.json extra keys:',extra);}catch(e){}"
